cli_short_desc: vtx is the official CLI for developing Veritix ERP plugins
cli_long_desc:
vtx automates the entire plugin development lifecycle for Veritix.
From initial scaffolding to signed publication in the Marketplace.
cmd_new_short: Create a new plugin project with the official structure
cmd_build_short: Compile and package the plugin into a .vtx file
cmd_publish_short: Upload the signed plugin to the Veritix Marketplace
cmd_add_short: Add a dependency to another Veritix plugin
cmd_login_short: Authenticate the CLI with Nexus Control Center (OAuth2 PKCE)
cmd_whoami_short: Shows the currently authenticated user and organization
cmd_cert_short: Manage RSA certificates for plugin signing
cmd_cert_status_short: Show current status of Publisher certificate
cmd_dev_short: Spin up a local development environment with a simulated DevShell
wizard_contracts_title: Should this plugin be usable as a dependency? (Creates .Contracts project)
msg_auth_waiting_ckm: Waiting for CKM (Client Key Management) confirmation...
msg_cert_signed_success: RSA signature generated and embedded successfully
msg_cert_registering_ckm: Registering fingerprint in CKM Transparency Log...
